title: Filve (CR90 corvette)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Youmay|the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]]|[[Filve|the planet of the same name]]}}
The '''''Filve''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] under the service of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. The [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|frigate]] ''[[Mayhem]]'' attempted to attack the ''Filve'' and the [[Bilbringi (CR90 corvette)|''Bilbringi'']] believing it to be a secret meeting between the Rebels and the [[Habassa]]. However, the Rebels leaked the information intending to capture the ''Mayhem''. The operation was a success.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Tour of Duty: B-Wing]]''
